name: tm_api
description: Execute any Tencent Meeting Open Platform API call with TC3-HMAC-SHA256 authentication. Agent decides the method, path, and parameters. Returns JSON response. Supports: /v1/meetings (query meetings), /v1/users/list (list users), /v1/records/transcripts/paragraphs (get transcript), /v1/addresses (get smart minutes), etc.
description_zh: 腾讯会议开放平台API通用调用，自动处理TC3-HMAC-SHA256鉴权

userid.description: Tencent Meeting userid for API calls that require it. If empty, uses operator_id from connection.
